summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Support Center page (/support). All 24 tests passed covering: page load, breadcrumb navigation, H1 heading, search input with live filtering, quick chips for brand filtering, 6 featured category cards, 15 article cards with brand tags and copy-link buttons, 5 brand accordions with expandable content, 3 deployment guides with numbered steps and verification checklists, 8-row 'Who Supports What' comparison table, CTA buttons, 6 internal related page links, navigation menu integration, footer link, page title SEO, console errors, and /company/support redirect. One bug was found and fixed: duplicate route definition was preventing redirect.

passed: 1. Page loads at /support without errors
2. Breadcrumb shows Home > Company > Support Center
3. H1 is 'Support Center'
4. Search input exists and is functional
5. Typing 'printer' in search filters articles to 2 printer-related ones
6. Typing 'wifi' in search returns 5 wifi/connectivity articles
7. All 8 quick chips render (Dejavoo, PAX, Ingenico, Clover, Square, Deployment, Testing, Funding Support)
8. Clicking Dejavoo chip filters to 4 Dejavoo-only articles
9. Clicking chip again deselects it - shows all 15 articles
10. 6 featured help category cards render (Terminal Support, POS Platform Support, Deployment & Testing, Merchant Account Support, Installation & Onboarding, Quick Troubleshooting)
11. 15 article cards render by default with brand tags
12. Each article card has a 'Copy link' button (18 total including deployment guides)
13. Support by Brand section shows 5 brand accordions (Dejavoo, PAX, Ingenico, Clover, Square)
14. Clicking Dejavoo accordion expands to show 5 articles/links
15. Deployment section shows 3 deployment guides (Dejavoo, PAX, Ingenico)
16. Each deployment guide has 7 numbered steps and 4 verification checklist items
17. Who Supports What table has 8 rows with 8 checkmarks
18. CTA section shows 'Contact Support' and 'Submit a Ticket' buttons
19. Internal links section shows 6 related page links
20. Page title contains 'POS Support Center'
21. No console errors
22. Navigation shows 'Support Center' under Company menu
23. Old URL /company/support redirects to /support (FIXED - was showing old Support page)
24. Footer includes Support Center link

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed duplicate route in App.js - line 226 had <Route path='/company/support' element={<Support />} /> which was overriding the redirect on line 229. Removed the duplicate to enable proper redirect to /support
SupportCenter.jsx implements clean Stripe-style knowledge base with: live search filtering across title/body/tags/brand, quick filter chips, brand-colored badges, and copy-to-clipboard functionality
4 SEO schemas implemented: WebPage, FAQPage (4 questions), BreadcrumbList, Organization
ARTICLES array has 15 articles across 5 brands (Dejavoo 4, PAX 4, Ingenico 3, Clover 2, Square 2)
DEPLOYMENT array has 3 deployment guides with steps arrays and SUPPORT_TABLE has 8 comparison rows
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for robust testing
seed_data_creation: N/A - Static content page with no database operations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Support Center page at /support is fully functional with: 1) Hero search with live filtering by title/body/tags/brand, 2) 8 quick filter chips (5 brands + Deployment + Testing + Funding Support), 3) 6 featured help category cards, 4) 15 popular articles with brand badges and copy-link buttons, 5) 5 brand accordions in Support by Brand section, 6) 3 deployment guides with numbered steps and verification checklists, 7) 8-row Who Supports What comparison table with checkmarks, 8) Contact CTA section, 9) 6 related internal links. Fixed /company/support redirect by removing duplicate route definition in App.js. Page uses client-side filtering (no backend calls). Copy-link uses navigator.clipboard API.
